prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-JUMBOBAGCLIP-2PK-STD Product Type: HOME Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 6 Inch Jumbo Stainless Steel Magnetic Bag Clip, Kitchen Clips for Chips Coffee Snacks Pet Food, Pantry Organizers and Storage (2pk) Description: Keep your kitchen, pantry and food storage areas neat, organized and easy to manage with this six inch stainless steel jumbo magnetic bag clip. Designed for everyday use with larger food bags and pantry staples, this multipurpose clip is ideal for sealing chip bags, coffee bags, cereal bags, snack bags, frozen food bags, baking ingredient bags, pet food bags and bulk pantry items. The strong, non slip clip helps keep open bags securely closed to support freshness and reduce spills, making it a practical food storage essential for busy kitchens.

Made from stainless steel with a clean brushed finish, this jumbo kitchen clip offers a durable, polished look that fits well in modern pantries, cabinets, drawers, refrigerators and countertop organization setups. The wide handle provides an easy grip for opening and closing the clip, even when sealing thicker folded bags or larger packages such as dog kibble, coffee, flour, sugar, rice, chips and other dry goods. At six inches long, the oversized design provides better coverage than smaller clips, helping secure larger bags with a firm hold quickly and easily.

The built in magnet on the back adds extra convenience for kitchen storage and quick access. Attach the clip to your refrigerator, metal pantry shelf, range hood, freezer, or other magnetic surface, so it is always nearby when you need to reseal open food packages. Use it to hold recipes, grocery lists, meal prep notes, coupons, or reminders while also keeping an extra bag clip ready for everyday pantry organization. Practical, sturdy, and easy to use, this stainless steel jumbo magnetic clip is a simple solution for keeping food bags closed, cabinets tidier and pantry staples fresher between uses. Search Terms: Stainless steel magnetic bag clip; jumbo chip clip; pantry food storage; snack coffee cereal dog food kibble freezer bag sealer; refrigerator magnet clamp; heavy duty wide grip brushed metal reusable clips; food meal prep; kitchen essentials Features: - KITCHEN PANTRY FOOD STORAGE: Six inch stainless steel jumbo magnetic bag clip has been designed for sealing open food bags in the kitchen, pantry, refrigerator, freezer and more, helping to keep everyday snacks and dry goods tightly closed between uses - STRONG JAWS FOR LARGER BAGS: These oversized clip helps close larger pantry bags such as chips, coffee, cereal, baking ingredients frozen foods, snack bags, dog kibble bags and more for practical and reliable everyday food storage - BUILT IN MAGNETIC BACKING: The magnet on the back allows the clip to attach to refrigerators, freezers, metal pantry shelves, range hoods, file cabinets and other magnetic surfaces for easy accessibility - WIDE EASY GRIP HANDLE: The wide handle is designed for comfortable opening and closing, making it easier to grip and secure thicker folded bags, bulk food packages and larger kitchen storage items - BRUSHED STAINLESS STEEL: Made with a clean brushed stainless steel finish, this jumbo clip offers a durable, modern design for kitchen organization, pantry storage, office notes, grocery lists, recipes and multipurpose home use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 2-pk 6 Inch Stainless Steel Magnetic Bag Clip

openai.item_name: Beille 2-pk 6 in Jumbo Stainless Steel Magnetic Bag Clip

tokens.name: Jumbo Stainless Steel Magnetic Bag Clip

anthropic.title_differentiation: Jumbo Clips For Large Bags, Built-in Magnet, Wide Grip Handle, Strong Hold, Pantry Food Storage

openai.title_differentiation: 2 Pack, Strong Magnetic Backing, Wide Easy Grip, Brushed Stainless Steel, Seals Large Bags, Refrigerator Storage
